mapper.select: SELECT EV.EV_ITEM_SUBJECT ,EV.EV_ITEM_CONTENTS ,EV.SCALE_TYPE_CD ,EV.EI_SQ ,(SELECT LISTAGG(EI.EI_ID_SQ, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(EI.EI_ID_SQ)) FROM STOCBDEI EI WHERE EI.GATE_CD = EV.GATE_CD AND EI.BUYER_CD = EV.BUYER_CD AND EI.EI_NUM = EV.EI_NUM AND EI.EI_SQ = EV.EI_SQ) AS EI_ID_SQ_LIST FROM STOCBDEV EV WHERE EV.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND EV.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND EV.EI_NUM = #{EI_NUM} AND EV.EV_ITEM_TYPE_CD = #{EV_ITEM_TYPE_CD} AND EV.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(EV.EI_SQ)

SELECT EI.EV_ID_CONTENTS ,(ET.RESULT_SCORE, 0) AS RESULT_SCORE ,EI.EV_ID_SCORE ,EI.EI_ID_SQ ,ET.REMARK FROM STOCBDEI EI LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCBDET ET ON (EI.GATE_CD = ET.GATE_CD AND EI.BUYER_CD = ET.BUYER_CD AND EI.EI_NUM = ET.EI_NUM AND EI.EI_SQ = ET.EI_SQ AND EI.EI_ID_SQ = ET.SEL_EV_ID_SQ AND ET.EU_SQ = #{EU_SQ} AND ET.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}) WHERE EI.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND EI.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND EI.EI_NUM = #{EI_NUM} AND EI.EI_SQ = #{EI_SQ} AND EI.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(EI.EV_ID_ORDER)

SELECT A.BUYER_CD, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT, #{VOTE_CNT} AS VOTE_CNT, A.VENDOR_CD ,CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN A.SUM_SCORE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((A.TECH_SCORE * (SUM(A.SUM_SCORE) / SUM(CASE WHEN A.SUM_SCORE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) / 100)), 5) END AS TECH_SCORE FROM ( SELECT EU.EU_SQ ,(SELECT SUM((T.RESULT_SCORE, 0)) FROM STOCBDET T WHERE T.GATE_CD = EU.GATE_CD AND T.BUYER_CD = EU.BUYER_CD AND T.EI_NUM = EU.EI_NUM AND T.EU_SQ = EU.EU_SQ AND T.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND T.EV_EXCEPT_FLAG = '0' AND T.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS SUM_SCORE ,AP.VENDOR_CD ,HD.BUYER_CD ,HD.BID_NUM ,HD.BID_CNT ,HD.CONT_TYPE2 ,(CASE WHEN CONT_TYPE2 = 'NE' THEN HD.TECH_SCORE ELSE 100 END) AS TECH_SCORE FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (AP.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND AP.APP_DATE IS NOT NULL AND AP.FINAL_FLAG = '500' AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDEU EU ON (EU.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND EU.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND EU.EI_NUM = HD.EI_NUM AND EU.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY A.BUYER_CD, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT, A.CONT_TYPE2, A.VENDOR_CD, A.TECH_SCORE

SELECT A.GATE_CD ,A.BUYER_CD ,A.BID_NUM ,A.BID_CNT ,A.BUYER_NM ,A.ANN_NO ,A.ANN_ITEM ,A.ORI_BID_STATUS ,A.BID_STATUS ,A.BID_STATUS_LOC ,A.EV_TPL_SUBJECT ,A.BID_PROGRESS_CD ,GETCOMCODE(A.GATE_CD, 'NH0024', A.BID_PROGRESS_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_PROGRESS_LOC ,(CASE WHEN A.TECH_EV_TYPE = '10' THEN A.BID_PROGRESS_CD WHEN SUBSTR(A.EU_CNT, 0, INSTR(A.EU_CNT, '/') - 1) = SUBSTR(A.EU_CNT, INSTR(A.EU_CNT, '/') + 1) THEN '300' ELSE '200' END) AS EU_PROGRESS_CD ,(CASE WHEN A.TECH_EV_TYPE = '10' THEN GETCOMCODE(A.GATE_CD, 'NH0024', A.BID_PROGRESS_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) ELSE GETCOMCODE(A.GATE_CD, 'M122', (CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.EU_CNT, 0, INSTR(A.EU_CNT, '/') - 1) = SUBSTR(A.EU_CNT, INSTR(A.EU_CNT, '/') + 1) THEN '300' ELSE '200' END), 0, #{ses.langCd}) END) AS EU_PROGRESS_LOC ,A.VENDOR_CD, A.VENDOR_NM ,(CASE WHEN A.TECH_EV_TYPE = '10' AND A.BID_PROGRESS_CD = '200' THEN '0/1' WHEN A.TECH_EV_TYPE = '10' AND A.BID_PROGRESS_CD = '300' THEN '1/1' ELSE A.EU_CNT END) AS EU_CNT ,A.ANN_DATE ,A.BID_USER_ID ,A.BID_USER_NM ,A.EV_USER_ID ,A.EV_USER_NM ,A.EI_NUM ,A.CONT_TYPE2 ,A.EV_TPL_NUM ,A.TECH_EV_TYPE ,A.VOTE_CNT ,A.OPEN_POSSIBLE_FLAG FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT HD.GATE_CD ,HD.BUYER_CD ,HD.BID_NUM ,HD.BID_CNT ,getBuyerNames(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, 'BID', HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, null, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM ,HD.ANN_NO ,HD.ANN_ITEM ,HD.BID_STATUS AS ORI_BID_STATUS ,(getBidProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, 'CD'), getBidAppProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, 'CD')) AS BID_STATUS ,(getBidProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, 'LOC'), getBidAppProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, 'LOC')) AS BID_STATUS_LOC ,'평가결과등록' AS EV_TPL_SUBJECT ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(S.VENDOR_CD) FROM STOCBDSP S WHERE S.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND S.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND S.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND S.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND S.DEL_FLAG = '0') = 0 OR HD.BID_STATUS IN ('2353', '2363') THEN '200' ELSE '300' END) AS BID_PROGRESS_CD ,NULL AS VENDOR_CD ,NULL AS VENDOR_NM ,NULL AS EU_CNT ,HD.ANN_DATE ,HD.BID_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM ,HD.EV_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.EV_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS EV_USER_NM ,HD.EI_NUM ,HD.CONT_TYPE2 ,HD.EV_TPL_NUM ,HD.TECH_EV_TYPE ,PG.VOTE_CNT ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(EU.EU_SQ) AS NON_FINISH_CNT FROM STOCBDEU EU WHERE EU.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND EU.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND EU.EI_NUM = HD.EI_NUM AND EU.PROGRESS_CD != '300' AND EU.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS OPEN_POSSIBLE_FLAG FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (AP.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND AP.APP_DATE IS NOT NULL AND AP.FINAL_FLAG = '500' AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCBDPG PG ON (PG.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND PG.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND PG.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND PG.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND PG.VOTE_CNT = (SELECT MAX(P.VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDPG P WHERE P.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND P.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND P.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND P.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND P.DEL_FLAG = '0') AND PG.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND #{ses.companyCd} IN (SELECT UR.COMPANY_CD FROM STOCCVUR UR WHERE UR.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND UR.USER_ID IN (HD.BID_USER_ID, HD.EV_USER_ID)) AND HD.CONT_TYPE2 IN ('TD', 'TS', 'NE') AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND HD.TECH_EV_TYPE = '10' AND (HD.BID_STATUS >= '2353' OR HD.BID_STATUS = '1300' OR (HD.CONT_TYPE2 ='TD' AND HD.BID_STATUS = '2350')) AND HD.BID_STATUS != '9999'
AND (HD.ANN_DATE >= #{ANN_DATE_FROM} AND HD.ANN_DATE <= #{ANN_DATE_TO})
AND (UPPER(HD.ANN_NO) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ANN_NO_ITEM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(HD.ANN_ITEM, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{ANN_NO_ITEM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND UPPER(HD.BID_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BID_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(HD.EV_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{EV_USER_ID}) '%'
AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
UNION
SELECT HD.GATE_CD ,HD.BUYER_CD ,HD.BID_NUM ,HD.BID_CNT ,getBuyerNames(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, 'BID', HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, null, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM ,HD.ANN_NO ,HD.ANN_ITEM ,HD.BID_STATUS AS ORI_BID_STATUS ,(getBidProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, 'CD'), getBidAppProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, 'CD')) AS BID_STATUS ,(getBidProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, 'LOC'), getBidAppProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, 'LOC')) AS BID_STATUS_LOC ,TM.EV_TPL_SUBJECT ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(S.VENDOR_CD) FROM STOCBDSP S WHERE S.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND S.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND S.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND S.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND S.DEL_FLAG = '0') = 0 OR HD.BID_STATUS IN ('2353', '2363') THEN '200' ELSE '300' END) AS BID_PROGRESS_CD ,AP.VENDOR_CD ,GETVENDORNAME(AP.GATE_CD, AP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,GETBIDEUCNT(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, AP.VENDOR_CD) AS EU_CNT ,HD.ANN_DATE ,HD.BID_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM ,HD.EV_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.EV_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS EV_USER_NM ,HD.EI_NUM ,HD.CONT_TYPE2 ,HD.EV_TPL_NUM ,HD.TECH_EV_TYPE ,PG.VOTE_CNT ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(EU.EU_SQ) AS NON_FINISH_CNT FROM STOCBDEU EU WHERE EU.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND EU.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND EU.EI_NUM = HD.EI_NUM AND EU.PROGRESS_CD != '300' AND EU.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS OPEN_POSSIBLE_FLAG FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCEVTM TM ON (TM.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND TM.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND TM.EV_TPL_NUM = HD.EV_TPL_NUM AND TM.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (AP.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND AP.APP_DATE IS NOT NULL AND AP.FINAL_FLAG = '500' AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCBDPG PG ON (PG.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND PG.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND PG.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND PG.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND PG.VOTE_CNT = (SELECT MAX(P.VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDPG P WHERE P.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND P.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND P.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND P.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND P.DEL_FLAG = '0') AND PG.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND #{ses.companyCd} IN (SELECT UR.COMPANY_CD FROM STOCCVUR UR WHERE UR.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND UR.USER_ID IN (HD.BID_USER_ID, HD.EV_USER_ID)) AND HD.CONT_TYPE2 IN ('TD', 'TS', 'NE') AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND HD.TECH_EV_TYPE = '20' AND (HD.BID_STATUS >= '2353' OR HD.BID_STATUS = '1300' OR (HD.CONT_TYPE2 ='TD' AND HD.BID_STATUS = '2350')) AND HD.BID_STATUS != '9999'
AND (HD.ANN_DATE >= #{ANN_DATE_FROM} AND HD.ANN_DATE <= #{ANN_DATE_TO})
AND (UPPER(HD.ANN_NO) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ANN_NO_ITEM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(HD.ANN_ITEM, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{ANN_NO_ITEM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND UPPER(HD.BID_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BID_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(HD.EV_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{EV_USER_ID}) '%'
AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.BID_PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD}
AND UPPER(A.BID_USER_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BID_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(A.EV_USER_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{EV_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(A.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(A.VENDOR_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STOCBDDT DT WHERE DT.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND DT.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND DT.BID_NUM = A.BID_NUM AND DT.BID_CNT = A.BID_CNT AND DT.PR_BUYER_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%' AND DT.DEL_FLAG = '0')
AND UPPER(A.BUYER_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
ORDER BY A.BID_NUM DESC, A.BID_CNT, A.VENDOR_CD
